passives.name: Prepared
passives.description: The first skill (slot 0) is immune to cooldown — it never goes on cooldown after firing.

skills.name: Arcane Bolt
skills.description: Deal dice + INT damage to a single enemy. Never goes on cooldown.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Deal dice + INT damage to all enemies and apply Burn. Goes on cooldown after use; refresh by spending dice worth a sum of 10.

skills.name: Barrier
skills.description: Grant the party a shared barrier equal to dice + INT HP. Expires at the start of the next round. Goes on cooldown after use; refresh by spending dice worth a sum of 15.
